hero.title: Welcome to
hero.description: From applicant tracking to employee engagement, ikky is your all-in-one HR solution.

centralCandidatePool.title: Central Candidate Pool
centralCandidatePool.description: Collect all applications in one place. CVs, interview notes, and communication history are neatly organized.

smartWorkflow.title: Smart Workflow
smartWorkflow.description: Automate candidate progression steps. Focus on people instead of repetitive tasks.

detailedAnalytics.title: Detailed Analytics
detailedAnalytics.description: Track your hiring metrics. See which sources perform better and optimize your processes.

secureAndCompliant.title: Secure and Compliant
secureAndCompliant.description: GDPR and KVKK-compliant data management. Candidate information is safe and stored legally.

fastIntegration.title: Fast Integration
fastIntegration.description: Easily integrates with your existing tools. Works seamlessly with email, calendars, and other HR systems.

teamCollaboration.title: Team Collaboration
teamCollaboration.description: Collaborate effortlessly with your hiring team. Comments, evaluations, and approvals—all in one platform.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Try it free for 14 days. No credit card required, cancel anytime.
